pi_items.source: Task description specifies 'rectangular plate 200 mm (Length) x 100 mm (Width) x 8 mm (Thickness)'
Task description specifies '8 mounting holes (Through-All Pockets)' in a '4x2 grid'
Task description specifies 'diameter 5.5 mm (M5 clearance)', which equals 2.75 mm radius
Task description specifies 'X = ±20, ±60' with '40 mm between columns'. Verified: spacing is uniform 40mm, symmetric about origin
Task description specifies 'Y = ±30' with '60 mm between rows'. Verified: spacing is 60mm (30 - (-30)), symmetric about origin
Standard manufacturing tolerance for plate dimensions. Allows ±2mm variation on each dimension
Standard tolerance range of ±5% from expected volume (158480 ± 7924 mm³). Ensures holes are present (solid block = 160000 mm³ would fail the 5% tolerance test)
Standard tolerance for hole diameter. Allows ±0.1mm variation on 2.75mm radius (5.5mm diameter ±0.2mm)
Task description specifies 'Save the finished model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/mounting_plate.FCStd'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a 200×100×8 mm rectangular mounting plate in FreeCAD with an 8-hole grid (4×2 arrangement). Hole specifications: M5 clearance (5.5mm diameter = 2.75mm radius), through-all pockets. Grid coordinates verified: X = [-60, -20, 20, 60] (40mm spacing), Y = [-30, 30] (60mm spacing), symmetric about origin. Expected volume after hole subtraction: 158479.47 mm³ (metadata claims 158480.0 mm³, verified to 0.0003% accuracy). All metadata parameters are consistent with engineering specifications and the task description.
